title: local-signing tests panic on missing /tmp key files instead of skipping
description: secretx-local-signing/src/lib.rs tests (ed25519_loads_and_signs, p256_loads_and_signs, rsa_pss_loads_and_signs, etc.) call LocalSigningBackend::from_uri(&ed25519_uri()).expect("ed25519 from_uri failed"). If the key files at /tmp/secretx-test-keys/ do not exist, from_uri() returns Err(SecretError::NotFound) and .expect() panics with a confusing message. — Maintenance consequence: any contributor running cargo test on a fresh checkout without the CI key-generation step will see panics rather than clean skips, which wastes time and makes the project look broken. Fix: check for NotFound and return (skip) instead of expect().
